reportedIssues: Some game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section appear slightly misaligned or cut off at the edges.
The text overlay on some game thumbnails might be hard to read against busy backgrounds.
The 'i' (info) icons on game tiles are quite small and may be difficult to tap on mobile devices.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a Jackpots category highlighting problem; they address game tile alignment, text readability, and icon size in different sections.
